name: Pricing: 30-Day Supply — Packaging
usage: Replaces the current bottle group image in the 30-day supply pricing card. Should show an actual branded monthly subscription box containing 30 bottles. Displayed on a dark (#2D2D2D) background card with the 'best value' badge. Approximately 16:9 landscape, 400px wide, 200px tall. The packaging should feel premium but warm and approachable — an elevated version of the starter box, not a completely different brand. Should match the 14-day starter's visual language.
prompt: A premium rectangular box package for a wellness shot brand called 'zesty', designed to hold 30 small PET bottles. The box is a warm cream-white color with the word 'zesty' printed in a rich golden-amber (#F2A922) bold lowercase sans-serif type on the front. A golden-amber accent stripe runs along the top edge. The box has a hinged lift-off lid that is propped open at roughly a 60-degree angle, revealing a neatly organized grid of bottles (5 rows of 6) nestled inside, each containing thick opaque golden-yellow liquid visible through clear PET plastic. The open lid leans against the back of the box, showing the 'zesty' branding on its inside surface. The box sits on a clean cream-white surface with warm, soft directional light from the left. Two loose bottles stand beside the open box for scale — one upright, one casually angled. A small sprig of fresh ginger and a turmeric root are placed beside the box as styling props. Subtle text on the box reads '30-day supply · 10g creatine per shot'. The packaging feels premium but warm — matte finish, clean Scandinavian design, the kind of beautiful minimal box you'd leave on your kitchen counter. The cream tones with golden accents create a cohesive family look with the 14-day starter. Overall mood: 'this is my daily ritual, and it looks beautiful doing it.'

scene.background: clean cream-white surface, warm and soft
scene.surface: smooth cream-white with gentle warm shadow

subject.description: large cream-colored box with hinged lid propped open showing 30 bottles in a grid, golden 'zesty' branding, two loose bottles and ginger/turmeric styling props beside it
subject.position: box slightly angled center, lid hinged open leaning back, loose bottles and props to the right
subject.angle: 25-degree overhead, showing the full grid of bottles inside and the premium exterior

camera.depth_of_field: medium, box and front bottles sharp, back bottles slightly softer

lighting.direction: from the left, warm and golden

style: premium warm Scandinavian packaging photography, Aesop meets wellness, clean and inviting, elevated but not cold
negative: no dark background, no dramatic noir lighting, no cool tones, no sliding lid, no cluttered arrangement, no glass bottles, no text overlays or watermarks, no cheap-looking packaging, no glossy plastic wrapping, no completely different aesthetic from the starter box
